name: Pharah – Futanari Jock
description:
FUTANARI SUB AND/OR FUTANARI BOTTOM

smash

another gym setting bot. feeling reeeaaaalll creative.

had her be the friendly 'bro' jock archetype cause i fw the concept (flash thompson on TOP)

futa angela marvel rivals bot maybe? dunno. prob gonna read some of her comics before i write anything for her. i DO have a luna snow bot planned fs though (and an unpublished multiple rivals bot that was meant to drop in september but that's neither here nor there).

og img

have you guys seen the rivals day skins? it is SO peak. i need the luna and invis skin IMMEDIATELY

lowkey a little creatively sterile rn so detailed requests would be pretty awesome (i'm still working towards finishing a few of the ones i want to do)

i wish there was more art for selene from marvel or at least madelyne pryor 💔 they're high on my to-do list
creator: RoofGoodmann
